[Your Address]  
[City, State, Zip Code]  
[Email Address]  
[Phone Number]  
[Date]  

[Employer's Name]  
[Company's Name]  
[Company's Address]  
[City, State, Zip Code]  

Dear [Employer's Name],

I am writing to express my interest in the Product Designer position at [Company's Name] as advertised. My name is David Wu and I am passionate about assuming a role where I can leverage my skills in creativity and technology to design notable user experiences. It is with great enthusiasm that I submit my application for a place in the Product Development department.

The opportunity to join [Company's Name] is appealing as it aligns seamlessly with my career goals and personal interests. I am highly motivated by the prospect of contributing to your team and am particularly drawn to how your company is recognized for its innovative approach to product design—a philosophy that matches my own ambitions and professional orientation.

My background in product design is shaped by a steadfast commitment to aligning creativity with technological advancements to craft exceptional user-centric products. I am confident that my ability to design and implement innovative solutions will be a valuable asset to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing my candidacy further. Please feel free to contact me at your convenience.

Warm regards,

David Wu

[Attachment: Resume]

goldAnswers.Cover Letter: I am enthusiastic about combining creativity and technology to build exceptional user experiences in the Product Development department.
